class.name: cynlr_state_broadcaster/CynlrStateBroadcaster
class.description: Reads the full ArmState struct from the hardware interface via bit_cast pointer trick and publishes ArmState, TCP pose, FT sensor, and external wrench topics.

class.name: cynlr_direct_command_controller/CynlrDirectCommandController
class.description: Escape hatch #1: subscribes to a JointCommand topic and writes directly to joint position/velocity command interfaces. Bypasses MoveIt and JointTrajectoryController. Use for learning policies and custom joint-space planners.

class.name: cynlr_nrt_passthrough_controller/CynlrNrtPassthroughController
class.description: Escape hatch #2: retrieves the raw ArmInterface pointer from the hardware interface and hosts MoveL/MoveJ/MovePTP action servers, calling arm NRT motion methods directly. Uses the arm's built-in trajectory planner without MoveIt.

class.name: cynlr_cartesian_controller/CynlrCartesianController
class.description: Escape hatch #3: subscribes to a CartesianCommand topic and writes directly to the Cartesian command interfaces (pose + wrench). The hardware plugin streams these to the arm in CARTESIAN_MOTION_FORCE mode at 1kHz. Use for force control, visual servoing, and Cartesian learning policies.
